title: ModularWarfare
description: ModularWarfare is a 1.12.2 mod made for military stuff, it is content-pack based and allow you to create your guns, attachments, magazines, bullets, armors & backpacks.
body:
**ModularWarfare** is a **1.12.2** mod made for **military stuff**, it is content-pack based and allow you to create your guns, attachments, magazines, bullets, armors & backpacks.

This new version allows you to add your stuff without minecraft modding knowledges, everything is based on .json files (plain text configurations).

The mod is designed for PVP and PVE combat experience in multiplayer and singleplayer mode.   

![enter image description here](https://modularmods.net/mw_banner.png)


[Youtube Showcase (click here)](https://youtu.be/vDGw-DAjWew)

**Prototype content-pack**

-   No need to download, it will be automatically installed when starting Minecraft with ModularWarfare in /mods/
-   Content: AK47, AK74u, HK416, MP40, UZI, SKS, Mosing-Nagant, L115A3 AWM, VSS, SPAS-12, P88,cd plenty of attachments, magazines and bullets.
-   Credit for the models: [https://sketchfab.com/TastyTony](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fsketchfab.com%252fTastyTony)

**Animated content-pack**

-   No need to download, it will be automatically installed when starting Minecraft with ModularWarfare in /mods/
-   Content: AK74, Desert Eagle, M4A4, M24A2, S1897
-   Credits: Models by TastyTony, Animations by Siz_Stan

**Community content-packs**

[_https://modularmods.net/index.php?resources/categories/modularwarfare.5/_](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fmodularmods.net%252findex.php%253fresources%252fcategories%252fmodularwarfare.5%252f)


**Join the community**
If you want help, join the community in the forum or discord:
**Forum:** [https://modularmods.net/index.php](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fmodularmods.net%252findex.php)
